option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
import re import sys
if len(sys.argv) != 2: print("Usage: python remove_history.py <css_file>") sys.exit(1)
file_path = sys.argv[1]
with open(file_path, 'r') as f: content = f.read()
# Split into lines lines = content.split('\n')
new_lines = [] i = 0 while i < len(lines): line = lines[i] stripped = line.strip() if stripped and ('history' in stripped.lower()) and ('{' in stripped or stripped.endswith(',')): # Possible start of history rule selector = stripped.split('{')[0].strip() if 'history' in selector.lower(): # Skip the rule brace_count = 0 while i < len(lines): if '{' in lines[i]: brace_count += lines[i].count('{') if '}' in lines[i]: brace_count -= lines[i].count('}') i += 1 if brace_count <= 0: break continue new_lines.append(line) i += 1
# Write back with open(file_path, 'w') as f: f.write('\n'.join(new_lines))

option.name: updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
import React from 'react' import './styles/PlantsCard.css' function PlantsCard({plant, onSelect}) { const handleCardClick = () => { if (onSelect) onSelect(plant.plantCode) } let statusColor = 'var(--accent)' if (plant.status === 'Active') statusColor = 'var(--status-active)' else if (plant.status === 'Spare') statusColor = 'var(--status-spare)' else if (plant.status === 'In Shop') statusColor = 'var(--status-inshop)' else if (plant.status === 'Retired') statusColor = 'var(--status-retired)' return (

({plant.plantCode}) {plant.plantName}

Location
{plant.location || 'N/A'}
Manager
{plant.manager || 'N/A'}
Status
{plant.status || 'Active'}
) } export default PlantsCard

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
import React from 'react' import './styles/PlantsCard.css' function PlantsCard({plant, onSelect}) { const handleCardClick = () => { if (onSelect) onSelect(plant.plantCode) } let statusColor = 'var(--accent)' if (plant.status === 'Active') statusColor = 'var(--status-active)' else if (plant.status === 'Spare') statusColor = 'var(--status-spare)' else if (plant.status === 'In Shop') statusColor = 'var(--status-inshop)' else if (plant.status === 'Retired') statusColor = 'var(--status-retired)' return (

({plant.plantCode}) {plant.plantName}

Status
{plant.status || 'Active'}
) } export default PlantsCard

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
import React from 'react' function PlantsOverview({plants}) { const total = plants.length const active = plants.filter(p => (p.status || '').toLowerCase() === 'active').length const inactive = plants.filter(p => (p.status || '').toLowerCase() !== 'active').length return (
{total}
Total Plants
{active}
Active
{inactive}
Inactive
{plants.map(plant => ( ))}
Plant Code Name Location Manager Status
{plant.plantCode} {plant.plantName} {plant.location || 'N/A'} {plant.manager || 'N/A'} {plant.status || 'Active'}
) } export default PlantsOverview

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
import React from 'react' export function PlantManagerSubmitPlugin({ form, yph, yphGrade, yphLabel, lost, lostGrade, lostLabel, summaryTab, setSummaryTab }) { return (
{summaryTab === 'summary' && (
Yards per Man-Hour
{yph !== null ? yph.toFixed(2) : '--'}
{yphLabel}
Excellent Good Average Poor
Yardage Lost
{lost !== null ? lost : '--'}
{lostLabel}
Excellent Good Average Poor
)}
) } export function PlantManagerReviewPlugin({ form, yph, yphGrade, yphLabel, lost, lostGrade, lostLabel, summaryTab, setSummaryTab }) { return (
{summaryTab === 'summary' && (
Yards per Man-Hour
{yph !== null ? yph.toFixed(2) : '--'}
{yphLabel}
Excellent Good Average Poor
Yardage Lost
{lost !== null ? lost : '--'}
{lostLabel}
Excellent Good Average Poor
)}
) }

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
import React, { useState } from 'react' function WeeklyGeneralManagerReportPlugin({ form, allReports, weekIso, plants = [] }) { const [historyWeekIndex, setHistoryWeekIndex] = useState(0) const [carouselIndex, setCarouselIndex] = useState(0) let historyReports = [] let historyWeeks = [] if (Array.isArray(allReports)) { historyReports = allReports.filter(r => r.name === 'general_manager' && r.completed) historyWeeks = Array.from(new Set(historyReports.map(r => r.week && new Date(r.week).toISOString().slice(0, 10)))).sort((a, b) => new Date(b) - new Date(a)) } let selectedWeekIso = historyWeeks[historyWeekIndex] || weekIso let selectedReport = historyReports.find(r => r.week && new Date(r.week).toISOString().slice(0, 10) === selectedWeekIso) let selectedForm = selectedReport && selectedReport.data ? selectedReport.data : form let displayPlants = plants if (!displayPlants || displayPlants.length === 0) { if (selectedForm) { displayPlants = Object.keys(selectedForm) .filter(k => k.startsWith('total_yardage_')) .map(k => k.replace('total_yardage_', '')) .map(code => ({ plant_code: code })) } } const columns = [ { key: 'plant', label: 'Plant' }, { key: 'active_operators', label: 'Active Operators' }, { key: 'runnable_trucks', label: 'Runnable Trucks' }, { key: 'down_trucks', label: 'Down Trucks' }, { key: 'new_operators_training', label: 'Operators Training' }, { key: 'operators_starting', label: 'Operators Starting' }, { key: 'operators_leaving', label: 'Operators Leaving' } ] function getValue(code, key) { if (key === 'plant') return code const val = selectedForm[`${key}_${code}`] if (val === undefined || val === null || val === '') return '---' return val } return (
{historyWeeks.length > 0 && (
View Week:
)}
{displayPlants.map((plant, idx) => (
setCarouselIndex(idx)} style={{ flex: 1, minWidth: 0, margin: '0 6px', background: idx === carouselIndex ? 'var(--accent)' : 'var(--background-elevated)', color: idx === carouselIndex ? 'var(--text-light)' : 'var(--text-primary)', borderRadius: 16, boxShadow: idx === carouselIndex ? '0 2px 12px var(--shadow-sm)' : '0 1px 4px var(--shadow-xs)', padding: '18px 0', fontWeight: 700, fontSize: 18, letterSpacing: '0.02em', textAlign: 'center', border: idx === carouselIndex ? '2px solid var(--accent)' : '2px solid var(--divider)', cursor: 'pointer', transition: 'background 0.2s, color 0.2s, border 0.2s' }} >
{plant.plant_name || plant.plant_code}
{plant.plant_code}
))}
{displayPlants[carouselIndex] && (
{displayPlants[carouselIndex].plant_name} ({displayPlants[carouselIndex].plant_code})
)}
{columns.map(col => ( ))} {displayPlants.map(plant => { const code = plant.plant_code return ( {columns.map(col => ( ))} ) })}
{col.label}
{getValue(code, col.key)}
) } export { WeeklyGeneralManagerReportPlugin }

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
import React from 'react' function parseTimeToMinutes(timeStr) { if (!timeStr || typeof timeStr !== 'string') return 0 const [h, m] = timeStr.split(':').map(Number) if (isNaN(h) || isNaN(m)) return 0 return h * 60 + m } function formatMinutesToTime(mins) { if (typeof mins !== 'number' || isNaN(mins)) return '' const h = Math.floor(mins / 60) const m = Math.round(mins % 60) return `${h > 0 ? h + ':' : ''}${m.toString().padStart(2, '0')}` } export function PlantProductionSubmitPlugin({ form }) { const rows = Array.isArray(form.rows) ? form.rows : [] let avgMinsElapsed1 = 0 let avgMinsElapsed2 = 0 let avgLoads = 0 let avgTotalHours = 0 let count = 0 rows.forEach(row => { if (row.mins_elapsed_1) avgMinsElapsed1 += parseTimeToMinutes(row.mins_elapsed_1) if (row.mins_elapsed_2) avgMinsElapsed2 += parseTimeToMinutes(row.mins_elapsed_2) if (row.loads) avgLoads += Number(row.loads) if (row.total_hours) avgTotalHours += Number(row.total_hours) count++ }) avgMinsElapsed1 = count ? avgMinsElapsed1 / count : 0 avgMinsElapsed2 = count ? avgMinsElapsed2 / count : 0 avgLoads = count ? avgLoads / count : 0 avgTotalHours = count ? avgTotalHours / count : 0 return (
Weekly Plant Production
NAME
TRUCK #
START TIME
1ST LOAD
MINS ELASPED
EOD IN YARD
PUNCH OUT
MINS ELASPED
LOADS
TOTAL HOURS
COMMENTS
{rows.map((row, i) => (
{row.name}
{row.truck_number}
{row.start_time}
{row.first_load}
{row.mins_elapsed_1}
{row.eod_in_yard}
{row.punch_out}
{row.mins_elapsed_2}
{row.loads}
{row.total_hours}
{row.comments}
))}
AVG
{formatMinutesToTime(avgMinsElapsed1)}
{formatMinutesToTime(avgMinsElapsed2)}
{avgLoads ? avgLoads.toFixed(2) : ''}
{avgTotalHours ? avgTotalHours.toFixed(2) : ''}
) } export function PlantProductionReviewPlugin({ form }) { return }

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
